title: Spot the ISS
description: Use a satellite-tracking app on your smartphone and a basic telescope to watch the International Space Station pass overhead.

dialogue.text: The ISS crosses our sky a few times each week. We'll use a tracker app on your smartphone to plan tonight's flyover. Find an open area and keep the telescope capped until you're outside to avoid pointing near the Sun.

Open a satellite-tracking app like Heavens-Above on your smartphone and allow location access to find tonight's pass. Level your basic telescope on stable ground, keep paths clear, and never aim it near the Sun.

options.text: The app shows a flyover soon.

dialogue.text: Awesome! It's inspiring to see humans living in orbit. Cap the telescope, pack up, and watch your footing in the dark.
